descriptors.name: Fire
descriptors.description: Elemental mastery of flame and heat.

applications.description: Make Intelligence checks to forge materials without tools, melt locks, create emergency lighting, or purify contaminated substances through controlled burning
Make Intelligence checks to regulate temperature in buildings, melt ice barriers, or create smoke signals visible for miles
Make Awareness checks to sense heat sources through walls, track warm-blooded creatures, or identify recent fires
Make Intelligence checks to work glass, ceramics, or metals with precision using controlled flame
Immune to heat-based damage and environmental effects from extreme temperatures

descriptors.name: Water
descriptors.description: Elemental mastery of water and ice.

applications.description: Make Intelligence checks to purify contaminated water sources, create ice tools/weapons, or navigate underwater environments
Make Intelligence checks to create fog banks for concealment, redirect waterways, or cause/stop precipitation
Make Awareness checks to locate water sources underground, sense moisture levels, or track creatures through wet environments
Make Intelligence checks to extract moisture from air in deserts or create breathable air pockets underwater
Immune to drowning and pressure effects underwater

descriptors.name: Earth
descriptors.description: Elemental mastery of stone and soil.

applications.description: Make Intelligence checks to locate mineral deposits, create stone tools/barriers, or navigate underground
Make Intelligence checks to create earthquakes, shape landscape, or reinforce structures
Make Awareness checks to sense vibrations through ground, locate underground spaces, or identify geological instabilities
Make Intelligence checks to shape stone into precise architectural forms or create permanent fortifications
Immune to crushing damage and effects from unstable terrain

descriptors.name: Air
descriptors.description: Elemental mastery of wind and atmosphere.

applications.description: Make Intelligence checks to create updrafts for assisted flight, carry messages via wind, or clear toxic gases
Make Intelligence checks to create localized weather patterns, disperse crowds with wind, or amplify/muffle sounds
Make Awareness checks to track scents across great distances, overhear distant conversations, or sense air pressure changes
Make Awareness checks to determine wind patterns for sailing/flying or predict weather changes
Immune to suffocation and airborne toxins
Make Intelligence checks to power electronic devices, create precise electrical discharges, or generate electromagnetic fields
Make Intelligence checks to disrupt electronics, create localized storms, or generate light displays
Make Awareness checks to sense electrical activity, track electronic devices, or identify electrical malfunctions
Make Intelligence checks to transmit messages through electrical networks or interfere with communications
Immune to electrical damage and electromagnetic interference

descriptors.name: Ice
descriptors.description: Elemental mastery of cold and freezing.

applications.description: Make Intelligence checks to preserve materials indefinitely, create precise ice constructs, or generate sub-zero environments
Make Intelligence checks to freeze liquids instantly, create slippery surfaces, or generate protective barriers
Make Awareness checks to sense temperature variations, track warm creatures in cold environments, or identify frozen substances
Make Intelligence checks to create temporary ice structures or reinforce existing materials with ice
Immune to cold damage and hypothermia effects

descriptors.name: Kinetic
descriptors.description: Energy mastery of motion and force.

applications.description: Enhance the force of moving objects, turning a pebble into a deadly projectile or a thrown spear into a devastating missile
Ignore impediments like mud, snow, or rubble, maintaining momentum without slowing
Absorb kinetic energy from impacts and transfer it elsewhere, such as reversing the force back to an attacker
Defy gravity temporarily, running on walls or maintaining footing on impossibly narrow surfaces
Immune to falling damage and impact-based effects
Surround yourself with glowing plasma, providing light and damaging nearby enemies with searing heat
Detect the presence of plasma generators, power sources, or active weapons within a wide radius
Manipulate plasma-like materials to weld, seal, or fuse objects permanently
Make Intelligence checks to generate controlled plasma discharges or manipulate existing plasma fields
Withstand high-energy environments, including intense radiation or plasma discharges
Heal from significant injuries and lost limbs or organs relatively quickly
Identify, neutralize, or create potent toxins and antidotes instinctively. Highly resistant to toxins, diseases, and biological effects
Form deep connections with animals, influencing their actions and understanding their emotions
Revive withered plants by touch, causing them to grow rapidly, even in barren environments
Immune to diseases, toxins, and biological manipulation

descriptors.name: Technology
descriptors.description: Mastery of mechanical and electronic systems.

applications.description: Communicate with machines as though they were sentient, intuitively diagnosing malfunctions or errors
Make Intelligence checks to decode encrypted data or bypass advanced security systems
Remotely interact with and control electronic systems, such as locking or unlocking doors, or rerouting power
Temporarily interface with and influence complex systems like vehicles or automated devices
Immune to technological surveillance and electronic interference

descriptors.name: Mental
descriptors.description: Mastery of psychic and cognitive forces.

applications.description: Share vivid memories, ideas, or concepts directly into another's mind, bypassing verbal communication entirely
Amplify the emotions of those around you to overwhelming levels, inducing fear, joy, or rage
Shield yourself from psychic intrusion, emotional manipulation, or mind-altering effects
Instantly retrieve forgotten memories or suppressed knowledge, including sensory details from years past
Immune to mental manipulation and psychic attacks
Detect and analyze magical effects within a wide radius, understanding their source and purpose
Decipher, replicate, or counter magical glyphs and sigils, even if highly advanced
Leave subtle magical traces on objects or locations, readable only by those with arcane knowledge
Sense and locate magical artifacts or enchanted items, regardless of concealment
Immune to magical effects and supernatural manipulation
Make Awareness checks to see the past/future states of objects and locations
Make Intelligence checks to determine exact timing of past events or predict future schedules
Make Intelligence checks to age or restore objects to different time periods
Make Intelligence checks to witness past events as they occurred
Accelerate or reverse time in an area, or move yourself through time. Work with GM to establish specific capabilities, limitations, and narrative impact appropriate to your campaign
Make Intelligence checks to measure exact distances/volumes without tools or understand spatial relationships
Make Awareness checks to navigate through complex 3D environments or folded space
Make Intelligence checks to create perfect geometric forms or impossible architectural spaces
Make Intelligence checks to compress or expand the apparent distance between locations
Open rifts to teleport vast distances. Work with GM to establish specific capabilities, limitations, and narrative impact appropriate to your campaign

descriptors.name: Probability
descriptors.description: Reality mastery of chance and outcomes.

applications.description: Make Intelligence checks to calculate precise odds of complex events or identify statistical anomalies
Make Awareness checks to spot improbable coincidences or detect manipulated probability
Make Intelligence checks to subtly influence random events in your favor
Make Awareness checks to sense when probability is being externally manipulated
Significantly alter probability outcomes. Work with GM to establish specific limitations and consequences
Perceive the atomic structure of objects, identifying weaknesses or flaws for precise interaction
Alter the density or composition of objects with a focused effort, such as hardening glass into steel
Ability to alter the distance between atoms for objects you can touch
Immune to any extreme temperature or radiation effects
Ability to start atomic chain reactions. Work with GM to establish specific capabilities, limitations, and narrative impact appropriate to your campaign
Intuitively know information about the state of the universe, the cosmos and other cosmic beings
Inspire awe or reverence in those around you, projecting a cosmic aura of authority
Operate unharmed in any environments, immune to any environmental effect
Make Intelligence checks to manipulate cosmic forces and stellar energies
You can infuse other beings with Cosmic energy and power. Work with GM to establish specific capabilities, limitations, and narrative impact appropriate to your campaign
